actions.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.

committees.committee: Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

official_title: A bill to prohibit the purchase of certain securities from covered entities, and for other purposes.
short_title: PRC Military and Human Rights Capital Markets Sanctions Act of 2025

summary.text:
PRC Military and Human Rights Capital Markets Sanctions Act of 2025

This bill prohibits U.S. persons from investing in securities issued by certain sanctioned and otherwise restricted entities, including Chinese military companies and Chinese entities sanctioned for human rights abuses or corruption.

The bill establishes divestment deadlines and criminal and civil penalties for violations of the bill.

titles.title: PRC Military and Human Rights Capital Markets Sanctions Act of 2025

A bill to prohibit the purchase of certain securities from covered entities, and for other purposes.
